mapper.select: SELECT id, question, answer, question_embedding, category, keywords, priority, hit_count, status, embedding_model, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_faq WHERE status = 1 AND question_embedding IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, question, answer, category, keywords, priority, hit_count, status, embedding_model, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_faq WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY priority DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_faq SET hit_count = hit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, question, answer, category, keywords, priority, hit_count, status, embedding_model, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_faq WHERE status = 1 AND (question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY priority DESC, hit_count DESC
